title: Uncraftable Craftable
description: A Minecraft datapack that makes some things craftable
body:
This is a Minecraft Datapack that adds a few recipes of items that are normally not available for crafting. The mod is open source [here on Github](https://github.com/nautrw/uncraftable-craftable/tree/main).

This datapack adds the following recipes:
- Chainmail armor
- Golden, diamond, and iron horse armor
- Saddle
- Trident
- Nametag
- Enchanted golden apple

The recipes are shown in the galery tab.

I made the recipes how I think they would be balanced, however, that is subjective. I wanted an easier time getting these items, and I think other users would too. I also believe that things like nametags should be craftable anyway.
